coordinator.c(3) Library Functions Manual coordinator.c(3)

NAME

coordinator.c - Ring consensus coordinator implementation.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct consensus_coordinator
Internal coordinator structure.

Macros


#define CONSENSUS_ROUND_INTERVAL_NS (5ULL * 60 * NS_PER_SEC_INT) /* 5 minutes */
#define CONSENSUS_COLLECTION_DEADLINE_NS (30ULL * NS_PER_SEC_INT) /* 30 seconds */

Typedefs


typedef struct consensus_coordinator consensus_coordinator_t
Internal coordinator structure.

Functions


asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_create (const uint8_t my_id[16], const consensus_topology_t *topology, consensus_election_func_t election_func, void *election_context, consensus_coordinator_t **out_coordinator)
Initialize coordinator with given parameters. void consensus_coordinator_destroy (consensus_coordinator_t *coordinator)
Clean up coordinator resources. asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_process (consensus_coordinator_t *coordinator, uint32_t timeout_ms)
Main orchestration loop. asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_on_ring_members (consensus_coordinator_t *coordinator, const consensus_topology_t *new_topology)
Update ring topology when participants change. asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_on_collection_start (consensus_coordinator_t *coordinator, uint32_t round_id, uint64_t deadline_ns)
Handle STATS_COLLECTION_START packet. asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_on_stats_update (consensus_coordinator_t *coordinator, const uint8_t sender_id[16], const participant_metrics_t *metrics, uint8_t num_metrics)
Handle STATS_UPDATE packet. asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_on_election_result (consensus_coordinator_t *coordinator, const uint8_t host_id[16], const uint8_t backup_id[16])
Handle ELECTION_RESULT packet. asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_get_current_host (const consensus_coordinator_t *coordinator, uint8_t out_host_id[16], uint8_t out_backup_id[16])
Get currently elected host. consensus_state_machine_t consensus_coordinator_get_state (const consensus_coordinator_t *coordinator)
Get current coordinator state. uint64_t consensus_coordinator_time_until_next_round (const consensus_coordinator_t *coordinator)
Get time until next round. int consensus_coordinator_get_metrics_count (const consensus_coordinator_t *coordinator)
Get count of metrics in current round.

Detailed Description

Ring consensus coordinator implementation.

Typedef Documentation

typedef struct consensus_coordinator consensus_coordinator_t

Internal coordinator structure. Opaque consensus coordinator handle.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_create (const uint8_t my_id[16], const consensus_topology_t * topology, consensus_election_func_t election_func, void * election_context, consensus_coordinator_t ** out_coordinator)

Initialize coordinator with given parameters. Initialize ring consensus coordinator.

Definition at line 43 of file coordinator.c.

45                                                                                           {
46   if (!my_id || !topology || !election_func || !out_coordinator) {
47     return SET_ERRNO(
48         ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameter: my_id=%p, topology=%p, election_func=%p, out_coordinator=%p",
49         (const void *)my_id, (const void *)topology, (const void *)election_func, (const void *)out_coordinator);
50   }
51 
52   consensus_coordinator_t *coordinator = SAFE_MALLOC(sizeof(consensus_coordinator_t), consensus_coordinator_t *);
53   if (!coordinator) {
54     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate coordinator");
55   }
56 
57   memset(coordinator, 0, sizeof(*coordinator));
58   memcpy(coordinator->my_id, my_id, 16);
59   coordinator->topology = topology;
60   coordinator->election_func = election_func;
61   coordinator->election_context = election_context;
62 
63   /* Initialize state machine */
64   asciichat_error_t err = consensus_state_create(my_id, topology, &coordinator->state);
65   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
66     SAFE_FREE(coordinator);
67     return err;
68   }
69 
70   /* Initialize round scheduling */
71   coordinator->last_round_start_ns = time_get_ns();
72   coordinator->next_round_id = 1;
73   coordinator->has_stored_result = false;
74 
75   /* Register coordinator with named registry */
76   char coordinator_name[64];
77   snprintf(coordinator_name, sizeof(coordinator_name), "consensus_coordinator:node_%u", my_id[0]);
78   NAMED_REGISTER(coordinator, coordinator_name, "consensus_coordinator_t", "0x%tx", NULL);
79 
80   /* Register child state with coordinator as parent */
81   NAMED_REGISTER(coordinator->state, "state", "consensus_state_t", "0x%tx", (uintptr_t)(const void *)(coordinator));
82 
83   log_debug("Coordinator created for node %u, first round in 5 minutes", my_id[0]);
84 
85   *out_coordinator = coordinator;
86   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
87 }




References ASCIICHAT_OK, consensus_state_create(),
    consensus_coordinator::election_context,
    consensus_coordinator::election_func, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_MEMORY, consensus_coordinator::has_stored_result,
    consensus_coordinator::last_round_start_ns, log_debug,
    consensus_coordinator::my_id, NAMED_REGISTER,
    consensus_coordinator::next_round_id, SAFE_FREE,
    SAFE_MALLOC, SET_ERRNO, consensus_coordinator::state,
    time_get_ns(), and consensus_coordinator::topology.


Referenced by session_consensus_create().

  consensus_coordinator_destroy (consensus_coordinator_t *
  coordinator)

93   if (!coordinator) {
94     return;
95   }
96   consensus_state_destroy(coordinator->state);
97   SAFE_FREE(coordinator);
98 }

asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_get_current_host
  (const consensus_coordinator_t * coordinator, uint8_t
  out_host_id[16], uint8_t out_backup_id[16])


Get currently elected host. Retrieves the host and backup elected
    in the most recent successful round. If no round has completed yet, returns
    stored previous result if available, or an error if no result exists.




Parameters


coordinator Coordinator handle


out_host_id Output 16-byte host UUID (caller provides buffer)


out_backup_id Output 16-byte backup UUID (caller provides buffer)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 379 of file coordinator.c.


380                                                                                                              {
381   if (!coordinator || !out_host_id || !out_backup_id) {
382     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameter");
383   }
384 
385   /* Try to get from current state first */
386   consensus_state_machine_t current_state = consensus_state_get_current_state(coordinator->state);
387   if (current_state == CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_COMPLETE) {
388     asciichat_error_t err = consensus_state_get_elected_host(coordinator->state, out_host_id);
389     if (err == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
390       err = consensus_state_get_elected_backup(coordinator->state, out_backup_id);
391     }
392     if (err == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
393       return ASCIICHAT_OK;
394     }
395   }
396 
397   /* Fall back to stored result */
398   if (coordinator->has_stored_result) {
399     memcpy(out_host_id, coordinator->stored_host_id, 16);
400     memcpy(out_backup_id, coordinator->stored_backup_id, 16);
401     return ASCIICHAT_OK;
402   }
403 
404   return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "No election result available");
405 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_COMPLETE,
    consensus_state_get_current_state(),
    consensus_state_get_elected_backup(),
    consensus_state_get_elected_host(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_INVALID_STATE, consensus_coordinator::has_stored_result,
    SET_ERRNO, consensus_coordinator::state,
    consensus_coordinator::stored_backup_id, and
    consensus_coordinator::stored_host_id.


Referenced by session_consensus_get_elected_host(), and
    session_consensus_is_ready().

  * coordinator)

440     return -1;
441   }
442   return consensus_state_get_metrics_count(coordinator->state);
443 }

413   }
414   return consensus_state_get_current_state(coordinator->state);
415 }

asciichat_error_t
  consensus_coordinator_on_collection_start (consensus_coordinator_t *
  coordinator, uint32_t round_id, uint64_t deadline_ns)


Handle STATS_COLLECTION_START packet. Called when receiving a
    collection start message from the previous ring member. Prepares to collect
    metrics and transitions state machine.




Parameters


coordinator Coordinator handle


round_id Collection round ID


deadline_ns Unix nanosecond deadline for this round


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 288 of file coordinator.c.


289                                                                                   {
290   if (!coordinator) {
291     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Coordinator is NULL");
292   }
293 
294   consensus_state_machine_t current_state = consensus_state_get_current_state(coordinator->state);
295   if (current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE) {
296     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Cannot start collection, state is %d", current_state);
297   }
298 
299   /* Start collection */
300   asciichat_error_t err = consensus_state_start_collection(coordinator->state);
301   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
302     return err;
303   }
304 
305   coordinator->next_round_id = round_id;
306   coordinator->collection_deadline_ns = deadline_ns;
307 
308   /* Measure and add our metrics */
309   err = measure_and_add_metrics(coordinator);
310   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
311     log_warn("Failed to measure metrics: %d", err);
312   }
313 
314   log_dev("Collection started: round_id=%u, deadline in %u seconds", round_id,
315           (unsigned int)((deadline_ns - time_get_ns()) / NS_PER_SEC_INT));
316 
317   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
318 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    consensus_coordinator::collection_deadline_ns,
    consensus_state_get_current_state(), CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE,
    consensus_state_start_collection(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_INVALID_STATE, log_dev, log_warn,
    consensus_coordinator::next_round_id, NS_PER_SEC_INT,
    SET_ERRNO, consensus_coordinator::state, and
    time_get_ns().


Referenced by session_consensus_on_collection_start().






asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_on_election_result
  (consensus_coordinator_t * coordinator, const uint8_t
  host_id[16], const uint8_t backup_id[16])


Handle ELECTION_RESULT packet. Called when election result is
    received from leader. Verifies the election, stores the elected host/backup,
    and stores for fallback.




Parameters


coordinator Coordinator handle


host_id Elected host UUID


backup_id Elected backup UUID


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 351 of file coordinator.c.


352                                                                                                                    {
353   if (!coordinator || !host_id || !backup_id) {
354     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameter");
355   }
356 
357   /* Store the elected host and backup */
358   memcpy(coordinator->stored_host_id, host_id, 16);
359   memcpy(coordinator->stored_backup_id, backup_id, 16);
360   coordinator->has_stored_result = true;
361 
362   log_info("Election result received: host=%u, backup=%u", host_id[0], backup_id[0]);
363 
364   /* Transition state back to IDLE */
365   consensus_state_machine_t current_state = consensus_state_get_current_state(coordinator->state);
366   if (current_state == CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_COMPLETE) {
367     asciichat_error_t err = consensus_state_reset_to_idle(coordinator->state);
368     if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
369       log_warn("Failed to reset state to IDLE: %d", err);
370     }
371   }
372 
373   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
374 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    CONSENSUS_STATE_ELECTION_COMPLETE,
    consensus_state_get_current_state(),
    consensus_state_reset_to_idle(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    consensus_coordinator::has_stored_result, log_info,
    log_warn, SET_ERRNO, consensus_coordinator::state,
    consensus_coordinator::stored_backup_id, and
    consensus_coordinator::stored_host_id.


Referenced by session_consensus_on_election_result().






asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_on_ring_members
  (consensus_coordinator_t * coordinator, const
  consensus_topology_t * new_topology)


Update ring topology when participants change. Called when the
    ring topology changes (participants join/leave). Updates internal topology
    reference and resets any in-progress round.




Parameters


coordinator Coordinator handle


new_topology New topology handle (not owned, must remain valid)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 259 of file coordinator.c.


260                                                                                                   {
261   if (!coordinator || !new_topology) {
262     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameter");
263   }
264 
265   /* Update topology reference */
266   coordinator->topology = new_topology;
267 
268   /* Reset state if we're in the middle of a round */
269   consensus_state_machine_t current_state = consensus_state_get_current_state(coordinator->state);
270   if (current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE) {
271     log_warn("Ring topology changed during round, resetting state");
272     consensus_state_destroy(coordinator->state);
273     coordinator->state = NULL;
274 
275     asciichat_error_t err = consensus_state_create(coordinator->my_id, new_topology, &coordinator->state);
276     if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
277       return err;
278     }
279   }
280 
281   log_info("Ring topology updated");
282   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
283 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, consensus_state_create(),
    consensus_state_destroy(),
    consensus_state_get_current_state(), CONSENSUS_STATE_IDLE,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, log_info, log_warn,
    consensus_coordinator::my_id, SET_ERRNO,
    consensus_coordinator::state, and
    consensus_coordinator::topology.


Referenced by session_consensus_set_topology().






asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_on_stats_update
  (consensus_coordinator_t * coordinator, const uint8_t
  sender_id[16], const participant_metrics_t * metrics, uint8_t
  num_metrics)


Handle STATS_UPDATE packet. Handle STATS_UPDATE packet (metrics
    relayed from another participant).


Definition at line 323 of file coordinator.c.


325                                                                                                                    {
326   if (!coordinator || !sender_id || !metrics) {
327     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameter");
328   }
329 
330   consensus_state_machine_t current_state = consensus_state_get_current_state(coordinator->state);
331   if (current_state != CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING) {
332     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Cannot accept metrics, state is %d", current_state);
333   }
334 
335   /* Add all metrics to state */
336   for (int i = 0; i < num_metrics; i++) {
337     asciichat_error_t err = consensus_state_add_metrics(coordinator->state, &metrics[i]);
338     if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
339       log_warn("Failed to add metric %d: %d", i, err);
340     }
341   }
342 
343   log_debug("Received %d metrics from sender %u", num_metrics, sender_id[0]);
344 
345   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
346 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    consensus_state_add_metrics(), CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING,
    consensus_state_get_current_state(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_INVALID_STATE, log_debug, log_warn,
    SET_ERRNO, and consensus_coordinator::state.


Referenced by session_consensus_on_stats_update().






asciichat_error_t consensus_coordinator_process
  (consensus_coordinator_t * coordinator, uint32_t
  timeout_ms)


Main orchestration loop. Main orchestration loop - call
    periodically.


Definition at line 221 of file coordinator.c.


221                                                                                                            {
222   (void)timeout_ms; /* Currently unused, but kept for future use */
223 
224   if (!coordinator) {
225     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Coordinator is NULL");
226   }
227 
228   uint64_t now_ns = time_get_ns();
229 
230   /* Check if we should start a new round */
231   if (should_start_new_round(coordinator, now_ns)) {
232     /* Only leader starts rounds */
233     if (consensus_topology_am_leader(coordinator->topology)) {
234       asciichat_error_t err = start_collection_round(coordinator, now_ns);
235       if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
236         log_warn("Failed to start collection round: %d", err);
237         return err;
238       }
239     }
240   }
241 
242   consensus_state_machine_t current_state = consensus_state_get_current_state(coordinator->state);
243 
244   /* Check for collection timeout */
245   if (current_state == CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING && has_collection_timed_out(coordinator, now_ns)) {
246     log_warn("Collection round timed out, completing early");
247     asciichat_error_t err = complete_collection(coordinator);
248     if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
249       log_error("Failed to complete collection on timeout: %d", err);
250     }
251   }
252 
253   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
254 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, CONSENSUS_STATE_COLLECTING,
    consensus_state_get_current_state(),
    consensus_topology_am_leader(), ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    log_error, log_warn, SET_ERRNO,
    consensus_coordinator::state, time_get_ns(), and
    consensus_coordinator::topology.


Referenced by session_consensus_process().






uint64_t consensus_coordinator_time_until_next_round
  (const consensus_coordinator_t * coordinator)


Get time until next round. Get time until next round is due.


Definition at line 420 of file coordinator.c.


420                                                                                                  {
421   if (!coordinator) {
422     return 0;
423   }
424 
425   uint64_t now_ns = time_get_ns();
426   uint64_t next_round_ns = coordinator->last_round_start_ns + CONSENSUS_ROUND_INTERVAL_NS;
427 
428   if (now_ns >= next_round_ns) {
429     return 0;
430   }
431 
432   return next_round_ns - now_ns;
433 }






References CONSENSUS_ROUND_INTERVAL_NS,
    consensus_coordinator::last_round_start_ns, and
  time_get_ns().


Referenced by
  session_consensus_time_until_next_round().
